title: Travel and transport
explanation:
Travel and transport

  • by bus / train / car / plane / bike
  • ticket, passport, luggage, platform
  • airport, station, hotel, map
  • Verbs: travel, arrive, leave, book

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: We took a ____ to the airport. | *taxi | passport | platform
Don't forget your ____ when you fly abroad. | *passport | luggage | map
The train leaves from ____ 3. | *platform | ticket | hotel
I bought a ____ online. | *ticket | station | arrive

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete these sentences. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: We went to the city by ____. | bus
The ____ was delayed by twenty minutes. | train
Our flight leaves from the ____. | airport
We stayed at a small ____. | hotel
I used a ____ to find the museum. | map

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She travels to work by ____. | *bike | passport | platform
We need to ____ our bags at the hotel. | *leave | arrive | ticket
What time does the flight ____? | *arrive | luggage | map
He goes to London ____ train. | *by | on | in
